properties.name: 唐（CHGIS 州面合并）
properties.reference: CHGIS, Version: 6. (c) Fairbank Center for Chinese Studies of Harvard University and the Center for Historical Geographical Studies at Fudan University, 2016. Layer: v6_time_pref_pgn (prefecture time-series polygons, WGS84).
properties.note: 合并 BEG_YR≤741≤END_YR 的州级多边形后简化；为行政辖境拼合，非「帝国宣称」边界。
